chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Guys, today's exercise is called shoutouts to everyone

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: and I'll tell you why I said that

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Everything will be clear after seeing the question of this exercise

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Let's go to the computer screen and let's get started

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Intro

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So guys, I'm very excited about today's question

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: because it's a big thing that I can't give shoutouts to everyone

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: I don't like it at all when I can't give shoutouts to people

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: because I know that everyone works hard and can't get a shoutout

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So what I did today is that I thought why not write a program

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: with which we can give shoutouts to everyone

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So what you have to do in this exercise, I'll tell you

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: You have to do your work and then I'll show you my magic in its solution

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: I'll give shoutouts to everyone with the help of this program, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So see what we have to do, you have to write a program

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: which will pronounce some names using Win32 API

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Now I'm in Mac, you may be in Linux or any other operating system

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: You have to figure out some other way to do it, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: But in Windows, I'll tell you that

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Sapi, Voice, Windows, Python, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Why did I write Sapi, Voice, Windows, Python?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: What happens is that Python text to speech, one minute

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: It becomes very easy to do text to speech, I'll show you

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: You will get its program, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: There is a package called PyWin32, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: And with its help, you can pronounce it like this

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: And what will happen is that you can pronounce it with the help of Windows built-in voice

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So you will figure out all this yourself, I won't tell you

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: what to do from where, what not to do

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Win32com.client, what it does, what it doesn't do, you have to see all this

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: And after figuring it out, you have to tell me, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: That whether you were able to make this program or not

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So here, once L is equal to Rahul, Nishant, Harry is written

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So your program will pronounce something like this

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Shoutout to Rahul, Shoutout to Nishant, Shoutout to Harry

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: By doing this, shoutout will be given to everyone

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: I have to give this list manually, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So I have to put this list, but then the shoutouts

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: will automatically give it to everyone, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So shoutouts will be given to everyone this time

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So don't miss anyone and I will put its solution very soon

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: I will put the solution soon because everyone will get a shoutout in this

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So I will put the solution soon, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So you must post your solution for this

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: And I hope everyone understood the question

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: One more thing to do, you have to solve this exercise

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Along with that, go to the first video

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: First of all, access the playlist and go to the first video

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: What you have to do is write a review here, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: You have to write a review, give 5 stars

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: How are you feeling?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Because now we are almost going towards completion of 100 days

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: And I am not saying that your learning of Python will end

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: You will keep learning, even I keep learning 50 things in today's date

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: And I am open to learning and that increases your skills the most

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: When you are open to learning things, okay?

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So you will keep learning

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: But now you tell me how you feel in this course

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Write a review for those people who are going to start this course

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So that they don't have to think at all the second time before coming to this course

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: So that's it for now in this video guys

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: I am waiting for your solution

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: And I will see you next time

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Thank you for watching it

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: And I will see you next time

chunks.title: Exercise 9 - Shoutouts to Everyone
chunks.text: Bye
